degree: Masters in Data Science, Analytics and Engineering

undergraduate.university: RNS Institute of Technology, VTU Board
undergraduate.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science

work_authorization_note: Eligible for OPT. Open to sponsorship.

work_experience.title: Freelance Web Developer
bullets: Revamped a legacy frontend for a retail client using React.js, delivering a responsive and user-centric interface that enhanced overall user experience and increased client engagement by 35%
Improved site performance by implementing lazy loading and other optimization techniques, resulting in a 40% reduction in page load time
Delivered timely maintenance and support, resolving 80% of reported issues within 24 hours to ensure consistent user experience and system stability

projects.name: LLM Council with Similarity Analysis
projects.description: Multi-LLM council system that queries models in parallel, uses a chairman model to synthesize final responses, and applies semantic similarity to evaluate and rank outputs.
projects.impact: Improved response quality through anonymous peer evaluation and redundancy detection across model outputs.
bullets: Built a multi-LLM council system that queried models in parallel, supported anonymous peer evaluation, and used a chairman model to synthesize higher-quality final responses
Applied sentence embeddings and cosine similarity to evaluate response relevance, detect redundancy, and quantify agreement across model outputs
Developed a FastAPI and React interface with streaming stages, heatmaps, relevance charts, and persistent conversation storage for transparent LLM decision-making

projects.name: F1 Race Prediction with Feedback Loop
projects.description: End-to-end F1 race outcome prediction pipeline with uncertainty quantification and a post-race incremental retraining loop.
projects.impact: Predicted race times with 95% confidence intervals; self-improving model via experience replay buffer.
bullets: Built an F1 race prediction pipeline by integrating FastF1 telemetry timing and results and engineering performance features to model race outcomes
Trained a deep neural network with uncertainty quantification to predict race times with 95% confidence intervals using Monte Carlo dropout

Implemented a post-race feedback loop that fetches official results, compares predictions vs actuals, tracks error metrics, and stores outcomes for incremental retraining via an experience replay buffer

projects.name: Hybrid Inpainting Data Analysis for 3D Meshes
projects.description: Hybrid 3D mesh inpainting system combining diffusion models with Neural Radiance Fields for high-accuracy mesh restoration.
projects.impact: Evaluated over 5,000 corrupted meshes using Mean Surface Error and Hausdorff Distance metrics.
bullets: Developed a hybrid 3D inpainting system integrating diffusion models with Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) to enhance mesh restoration accuracy and realism
Generated a dataset of 5,000 corrupted 3D meshes from Objaverse 1.0 by applying random masks and creating error maps
Evaluated 3D mesh repair techniques like PCN and Poisson Surface Reconstruction using metrics such as Mean Surface Error and Hausdorff Distance to measure accuracy

projects.name: Modeling the S&P 500 with Linear Regression
projects.description: Predictive regression model on macroeconomic indicators to detect financial risk patterns and anomalies in S&P 500 returns.
projects.impact: Demonstrated that linear models explained less than 10% of variance, motivating non-linear modeling approaches.
bullets: Built a predictive regression model on macroeconomic indicators (e.g., Treasury yields, oil prices) to detect financial risk patterns and anomalies
Evaluated model accuracy via R-squared and RMSE to enhance interpretability for audit and risk assessment contexts
Found that linear models explained less than 10% of variance, indicating limited predictive power and highlighting the need for non-linear modeling approaches

projects.name: Distributed Online Gaming Platform
projects.description: Dockerized microservices gaming platform with Flask and MongoDB, supporting data science use cases via BSON gameplay datasets.
projects.impact: Standardized local-to-prod deployments and improved query readability through optimized schema design.
bullets: Built and deployed a Dockerized service stack using Flask and MongoDB, standardizing local-to-prod environments and simplifying repeatable deployments
Processed BSON datasets capturing gameplay and user activity to support data science and modeling use cases
Standardized naming conventions and optimized schema design to improve query readability and future data governance across collections

projects.name: Automatic Number Plate Detection
projects.description: Real-time Automatic Number Plate Recognition system using YOLOv8 for detection and EasyOCR for text extraction from license plates.
projects.impact: Achieved accurate real-time license plate recognition from live video streams with improved detection accuracy via OpenCV preprocessing.
bullets: Built an Automatic Number Plate Recognition system using YOLOv8 for vehicle and plate detection, and EasyOCR for extracting alphanumeric text from license plates
Integrated real-time video stream processing with object detection and OCR pipelines to enable accurate and automated license plate recognition
Applied OpenCV for image preprocessing and visualization, improving detection accuracy and system interpretability

projects.name: Catching Ball Game
projects.description: Interactive computer vision game with structured data logging and performance-optimized rendering.
projects.impact: Improved engagement metrics by 40% and enhanced frame rate by 25% through algorithmic and rendering optimizations.
bullets: Developed an interactive game with structured data logging from more than 100 users, enabling player behavior analysis
Designed and implemented scoring algorithms, improving engagement metrics by 40%
Optimized rendering efficiency, enhancing frame rate by 25%, demonstrating performance-driven computation

projects.name: Railway Reservation System
projects.description: Full-stack railway booking system with ticket booking, cancellation, admin role-based access, and normalized MySQL schema.
projects.impact: Enabled real-time seat tracking and secure admin/user login with efficient normalized database design.
bullets: Built a full-stack railway booking system with features for ticket booking, cancellation, and inquiries
Added secure admin/user login with role-based access to manage trains, stations, and user data
Designed a normalized MySQL schema for efficient ticketing and real-time seat tracking
